ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "block" TEXT /* Block number of the property */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Street name of the property */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the data was recorded */,
  "town" INTEGER /* ID of the town where the property is located */,
  "flat_type" INTEGER /* ID of the flat type */,
  "storey_range" TEXT /* Storey range of the flat */,
  "floor_area_sqm" INTEGER /* Floor area of the flat in square meters */,
  "flat_model" INTEGER /* ID of the flat model */,
  "lease_commence_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease commenced */,
  "remaining_lease" TEXT /* Remaining lease duration */,
  "resale_price" INTEGER /* Resale price of the flat */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "lat_long" TEXT /* Latitude and longitude coordinates of the property */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to a reference point or amenity */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the property based on various factors */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, sold, under construction) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time when the property information was updated */,
  "amenity_count" INTEGER /* Number of nearby amenities */,
  "average_distance_to_amenities" REAL /* Average distance to nearby amenities */,
  "proximity_to_public_transport" REAL /* Distance to the nearest public transport */,
  "proximity_to_schools" REAL /* Distance to the nearest schools */,
  "proximity_to_parks" REAL /* Distance to the nearest parks */,
  "proximity_to_hospitals" REAL /* Distance to the nearest hospitals */,
  "proximity_to_shopping" REAL /* Distance to the nearest shopping areas */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "property_images" TEXT /* URLs or paths to property images */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces */,
  "maintenance_fee" INTEGER /* Monthly maintenance fee */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_flat_model FOREIGN KEY ("flat_model") REFERENCES flat_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_flat_type FOREIGN KEY ("flat_type") REFERENCES flat_types ("flat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_town FOREIGN KEY ("town") REFERENCES towns ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the town is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the town */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income of residents in the town */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the town */,
  "amenity_density" REAL /* Density of amenities in the town */,
  "public_transport_density" REAL /* Density of public transport options in the town */,
  "school_density" REAL /* Density of schools in the town */,
  "park_density" REAL /* Density of parks in the town */,
  "hospital_density" REAL /* Density of hospitals in the town */,
  "shopping_density" REAL /* Density of shopping areas in the town */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the town */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flat_types" (
  "flat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flat type */,
  "flat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the flat type */,
  "average_floor_area" REAL /* Average floor area for the flat type */,
  "average_price" INTEGER /* Average resale price for the flat type */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on demand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the flat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flat_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flat model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the flat model */,
  "average_floor_area" REAL /* Average floor area for the flat model */,
  "average_price" INTEGER /* Average resale price for the flat model */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score based on demand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the flat model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leasing" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "commence_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease commenced */,
  "remaining_duration" TEXT /* Remaining lease duration */,
  "lease_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the lease in years */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease will end */,
  "lease_status" TEXT /* Current status of the lease (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leasing_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "resale_price" INTEGER /* Resale price of the property */,
  "month_recorded" TEXT /* Month when the price was recorded */,
  "price_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the price (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price compared to the previous month */,
  "price_per_sqm" REAL /* Price per square meter */,
  "price_per_bedroom" REAL /* Price per bedroom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocation" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geolocation entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the property */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the property */,
  "address_components" TEXT /* JSON object containing components of the address (e.g., street, city, state, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geolocation_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the amenity */,
  "distance_to_property" REAL /* Distance from the amenity to the property */,
  "amenity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the amenity */,
  "amenity_rating" REAL /* Rating of the amenity (e.g., 4.5 stars) */,
  "amenity_open_hours" TEXT /* Open hours of the amenity */,
  "amenity_services" TEXT /* Services provided by the amenity */,
  "amenity_images" TEXT /* URLs or paths to amenity images */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, investor, buyer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time when the user logged in */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing user preferences (e.g., preferred property types, budget) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, favorite) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the property (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
